initialFeaturedArticle.title: Aston Villa win the Europa League and Emery secures his fifth title
initialFeaturedArticle.excerpt: Aston Villa defeated Freiburg 3-0 in Istanbul to secure the Europa League berth. Goals from Tielemans, Buendía, and Rogers ended a 44-year wait under Unai Emery.
